ProLuxe Travel

ProLuxe Bureau, preview

ProLuxe Bureau, for the office

Every booking in one view.

Multi-city itineraries, the principal plus team, conference programmes, all visible from one screen.

Stage one

The attendee opens the link.

A page, just for them, against the venue. They choose a room from the rooms ProLuxe has already held, write a few preferences, and confirm. About 90 seconds, no account to create.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/laura

Welcome, Laura

Q1 Senior Leadership Offsite

Geneva · March 2027

Choose your room

Beau-Rivage

Lake-view king. 4 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,180per night

Four Seasons des Bergues

River-view king. 6 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,240per night

Mandarin Oriental

Executive king. 9 minute walk to the venue.

CHF 1,090per night

Preferences

King bed
Quiet floor
Pescatarian. No dairy.
12 March, late evening · LX 351 from London City
A note for the general manager. Anything that needs to be known in advance.

Your stay

Hotel Beau-Rivage
Room Lake-view king
Arrival 12 Mar, late
Departure 14 Mar
Nights 2

The room is held under your principal's allocation. No payment required at this stage. The general manager will be briefed before arrival.

Stage two

They confirm. The hotel is briefed.

A held room becomes a confirmed room. ProLuxe sends the file to the property and notes anything the general manager should know about the arrival.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/laura/confirmed

Confirmed

Laura, you are held at Beau-Rivage in March.

The general manager has been briefed on the late arrival, the dietary preference, and the quiet floor. The car will be at the door of arrivals.

Confirmation PLX-2703-LH
Hotel Beau-Rivage Genève
Room Lake-view king, quiet floor
Dates March 2027

Anything you add later moves forward with the file.

With my best regards,

Myles Longfield

Stage three

A short note follows by email.

Same content as the screen, in the inbox. From a real address, with a real signature. Forwardable to the principal's office without a tidy-up.

From Myles Longfield <myles@proluxetravels.com>
To Laura Hammond <laura.hammond@example.com>
Date 28 February 2027

Beau-Rivage held, March 2027

Dear Laura,

You are held at Beau-Rivage in March, lake-view king on a quiet floor. The general manager has been briefed on the late arrival, the dietary, and the car at the door.

Confirmation reference is PLX-2703-LH. Anything else you need to add to the file, please send to me directly.

With my best regards,

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

Stage four

What you see, from your desk.

The same Bureau, opened to your office. Live as confirmations come in. Filter by hotel or destination across the whole rooming list. Edit a preference or move a room yourself, or pass anything back to the team with one click.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/admin/q1-senior-leadership-mar27

Activity

10:42, today Diana Chen confirmed at Four Seasons des Bergues. Dietary noted.
09:38, today Mandarin Oriental flagged a bath preference for Klaus Müller. ProLuxe to confirm.
Yesterday Beau-Rivage held three additional rooms for late arrivals.
2 days ago Four Seasons confirmed the contracted rooming list.
Klaus Müller, Mandarin Oriental: bath preference flagged by reservations.

Behind the scenes

How your office uses Bureau is up to your office.

ProLuxe Bureau runs whichever way fits the operation. Access is private to your office, gated behind secure login, with each attendee's link unique to them. Your two options below.

Option one

We run the rooming list.

The team block-books inventory across the cities, briefs each property, manages preferences and amendments, sends confirmations. You receive a single weekly status note. The principal's office hears nothing it does not need to.

Option two

You manage Bureau privately.

The same view as ours, opened to your office. You see the rooming list, hold and release rooms, edit preferences, send the confirmations under your own signature. The team is on standby for anything you would rather pass back.

A static preview of ProLuxe Bureau. The live system is built around your event with personalised attendee links, your inventory, your preferences, and ProLuxe staff briefed on the file before any attendee logs in.

Back to ProLuxe Travel
